description: Allocating temporary objects every frame so the garbage collector periodically pauses the loop, producing visible stutter.
body: Failure mode: hot-path code allocates per frame (temporary vectors, closures, boxed values, string concatenation, LINQ), accumulating garbage that triggers a GC pause exceeding the frame budget. Detection signals: periodic regular stutters even when average frame time is fine; allocation graph climbs each frame then drops at a spike; profiler shows GC time at the hitches. Do not allocate in the hot loop. Safer fallback: pool and reuse objects, pre-size and reuse buffers, remove hidden allocations, and verify a flat allocation graph with no GC spikes during steady play.
